caption:
34K likes, 140 comments - dee_scribble on July 5, 2025: "Ep:01, lesson:01 - SAYING NO TO WHAT'S NOT MINE! 

One decision.
That’s all it took to change the entire direction of my life.

Saying no to my father for the future we both dreamt of was not easy.

The confusion, the guilt, the "maybe I’ll try it for a while"... I’ve lived it all.

But in that moment, I knew
I’d rather fail at what I love
than win at something that’s not me.

His silence was loud.
But I decided to speak through my choices.

And now, I’m learning to co-exist with love, responsibility… and the version of me I chose.

#mostlydeecoded #deegang  #deescribble".

Corporate networking... Not just helps you with tips and tricks in your job but will play a crucial role in understanding how the market is and how people in it think!!! This is just like another consumer research if you want to switch, upskill or start your own business.

I'd ALWAYS encourage y'all to keep learning and upskilling because end of the day, that's the only thing which helps.. and the tips I mentioned in this video will be complimentary to make your learning better🫶✨

-Dee🩷".

8,717 likes, 21 comments - dee_scribble on August 15, 2025: "The day he comes home walking on his little feet 

భజగోవిందం 🪷✨

భగవద్గీతా కించిదధీత
గంగా జలలవ కణికాపీతా |
సకృదపి యేన మురారి సమర్చా 
క్రియతే తస్య యమేవ న చర్చ ||

భావం: ఎవరైతే భగవద్గీతని కొంచమైనా అధ్యయనం చేస్తారో, గంగా జలాన్ని కొద్దిగా ఐనా తాగుతారో, కొంచమైనా శ్రీకృష్ణుని పూజిస్తారో అట్టివారికి యమునితో వివాదం ఉండదు. 

పునరపి జననం పునరపి మరణం
పునరపి జననీ జఠరే శయనం |
ఇహ సంసార బహు దుస్తారే 
కృపయా పారే పాహి మురారే ||

భావం: మళ్ళీ మళ్ళీ పుట్టడం, మళ్ళీ మళ్ళీ చావడం; మళ్ళీ మళ్ళీ తల్లి గర్భంలో ప్రవేశించి అక్కడ ఉండడం - ఈ అంతులేని సంసార జనన మరణ చక్రబంధం నుండి తప్పించుకోవడం కష్టమైన పని. కనుక ఓ కృష్ణా! దయచేసి మమ్ములను రక్షించు. 

శ్రీకృష్ణ జన్మాష్టమి శుభాకంక్షలు 🙏 🪷✨".

14K likes, 107 comments - dee_scribble on July 3, 2025: "MOSTLY DEE-CODED - This series is me. When I say it, I mean it! 

A cluster of stories evolved from my love/hate relationship with my own life.. that only ends up teaching me to live better. 

If I were your friend, I would have a conversation about everything that made me feel better, with a selfish purpose that even my friends have to feel better, dodge those bullets when similar situation showsup in their lives.

So today, I'm here! Considering you guys as my besties! 

20 episodes, so situations, so lessons!!!

From my heart, directly to each of yours🫶🩷

#mostlydeecoded #deetales #deescribble".
